title: bitwarden: re-authenticates on every get() call
description: secretx-bitwarden/src/lib.rs get() calls build_authed_client() on every invocation, which performs a full authentication roundtrip each time. Trigger: high-frequency calls to get() or refresh() → one full auth roundtrip per call. Even with CachingStore wrapping, the first miss after TTL expiry triggers an unnecessary auth. Fix: cache the authenticated client or session token inside BitwardenBackend, refreshing only on auth failure.
